title: Bridge Essay: Neural Correlates of Body Integrity Dysphoria.
concept: Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.
**Phase context:** Body as constructed percept — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, ownership plasticity.

**Neural Correlates of Body Integrity Dysphoria.** — Curr Biol (2020). DOI: 10.1016/j.cub.2020.04.001. PMID: 32386532. There are few things as irrefutable as the evidence that our limbs belong to us. However, persons with body integrity dysphoria (BID) [1] deny the ownership of one of their fully functional limbs and seek its amputation [2]. We tapped into the brain mechanisms of BID, examining sixteen men desiring the removal of the left healthy leg.
